assertion_results.text: The post-triage summary comment (Step 8) includes an @mention of the vulnerability issue's reporter using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id' (§1.67)
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md (Step 8) contains an ADF mention node with "type": "mention", "attrs": {"id": "557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id", "text": "@psirt-analyst"} at lines 220-225 of the output file.

assertion_results.text: The reporter @mention in Step 8 is present by default without any ProdSec configuration — it uses the reporter field from the Jira issue (§1.67)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md (Step 1) line 18 shows 'Reporter | psirt-analyst (557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id)' extracted from the Jira issue. The Step 8 mention uses this same account ID '557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id', confirming it was sourced from the reporter field, not from any ProdSec configuration.

assertion_results.text: The Affects Versions correction comment (Step 3) includes an @mention of the ProdSec contact using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: affects-versions.md (Step 3) contains an ADF mention node with "type": "mention", "attrs": {"id": "557058:prodsec-mock-account-id", "text": "@prodsec-team"} at lines 120-125 of the output file.

assertion_results.text: The ProdSec @mention appears before the Comment Footnote in the Affects Versions correction comment (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: In affects-versions.md (Step 3) ADF JSON, the ProdSec @mention paragraph (lines 119-131) precedes the horizontal rule ("type": "rule", lines 133-135) and the Comment Footnote paragraph ('This comment was AI-generated by sdlc-workflow/triage-security v0.12.2.', lines 136-160).

assertion_results.text: The ProdSec Jira account ID from the Security Configuration is successfully extracted and used in the Affects Versions correction comment — evidenced by the @mention with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' in Step 3 output (Step 0 config extraction → Step 3 usage)
assertion_results.evidence: The Step 3 ADF mention node in affects-versions.md contains "id": "557058:prodsec-mock-account-id", confirming the ProdSec Jira account ID was successfully extracted from Security Configuration and used to construct the @mention in the Affects Versions correction comment.
